assertions.expectation: Identifies PDB as the most likely/common cause of stuck upgrades
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'Check and fix PDBs - This is the #1 cause' and mentions PDBs as the most common cause for stuck upgrades

assertions.expectation: Provides kubectl command to check PDBs (kubectl get pdb --all-namespaces or similar)
assertions.reason: Provides exact command 'kubectl get pdb --all-namespaces' and also 'kubectl describe pdb --all-namespaces'

assertions.expectation: Provides commands to identify which pods are blocking the drain
assertions.reason: Includes multiple commands: 'kubectl get pods --all-namespaces --field-selector=status.phase=Pending', commands to check nodes being drained, and event checking

assertions.expectation: Includes resource constraint diagnosis (capacity issues, pending pods)
assertions.reason: Includes command to check pending pods and mentions checking node conditions and capacity-related issues

assertions.expectation: Provides a fix for restrictive PDBs (patch or temporary adjustment)
assertions.reason: Provides specific kubectl patch command to temporarily adjust PDB: 'kubectl patch pdb [PDB_NAME] -n [NAMESPACE] --type merge -p '{"spec":{"minAvailable":0}}'

assertions.expectation: Mentions that GKE has a PDB timeout (up to 1 hour) after which it may force-drain, and that GKE sends notifications when eviction is blocked by PDB
assertions.reason: Does not mention GKE's PDB timeout behavior or automatic notifications when eviction is blocked

assertions.expectation: Includes guidance on surge upgrade settings as a potential fix
assertions.reason: Provides multiple references to surge settings including specific commands with --max-surge and --max-unavailable parameters

assertions.expectation: Mentions webhook issues as a possible cause
assertions.reason: Does not mention admission webhooks or webhook validation as a potential cause of stuck upgrades

assertions.expectation: Includes validation steps to confirm the fix is working
assertions.reason: While providing diagnostic commands, does not include specific steps to validate that the fixes are working or the upgrade is proceeding

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE disruption-event notifications (POD_PDB_VIOLATION) that alert when eviction is blocked by PDB, available via Cloud Logging or Pub/Sub
assertions.reason: Does not mention specific GKE disruption-event notifications, POD_PDB_VIOLATION events, or Cloud Logging/Pub/Sub integration
